# Data engineers enable effective use of data

## Help users analyze data
  Build dashboards for business users; Create datasets with appropriate information for DS/DA; Create access layers that other systems can access

## Build systems to get data to users
  Build system to get data ready for end user
  Work with users to identify what data to build
  Resolve data issues 

## Create long term plans to enable effective data use
  Work with users to identify types of data theyd need
  Build software foundations that standardizes DEs work
